title: The NearVanilla Modpack (Lite)
description: The Lite Version of the NearVanilla Modpack, containing only the recommended Optimisations to ensure a smooth playing experience.
body:
# Welcome! 👋

Welcome to the **Official Page** for the Lite variant of the **NearVanilla Modpack**! In this Modpack, you will find a comprehensive list of **Recommended Optimization Mods**, aiming to give you a marginal performance boost over that of Vanilla Minecraft. We also aim to provide you with a Base for your own Modpack, allowing you to personalize by adding your own mods to the list.

---

In addition to the several performance benefits that come with the NearVanilla Modpack, we will also ensure that **regular update checks** are carried out to ensure that you stay up-to-date, as well as keeping our eye out for **emerging Optimization Mods** that will further improve your gameplay experience.
